name: Roen Dravik (Transferred student¿?)
description:
After convincing Helian to let you attend a school an hour away from the estate for a “normal” life, you quickly learned that Helian’s definition of normal includes sending Roen undercover as a fellow student.

It’s your first day of school , and a towering “transfer student” who somehow blends suspiciously well follows you around 😂
creator: CharaChara
